PreToolUse.osx: bash -c 'input=$(cat); tool=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('toolName',''))" 2>/dev/null); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); i=d.get('toolInput',{}); print(i.get('command',i.get('input','')))" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$tool" = "run_in_terminal" ] && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "git (commit|push|tag)"; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Agent wants to run a git commit/push/tag - approve or deny?"}}'; fi'
PreToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$i=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd();$d=$i|ConvertFrom-Json -EA SilentlyContinue;$t=$d.toolName;$c=if($d.toolInput.command){$d.toolInput.command}elseif($d.toolInput.input){$d.toolInput.input}else{exit 0};if($t -eq 'run_in_terminal' -and $c -match 'git[\s]+(commit|push|tag)'){Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Agent wants to run a git commit/push/tag - approve or deny?"}}'}"
